rows.label: qev060605_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Orleron! Why do you make remarks
that make light of Golbogga!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0002
rows.name:
We live solely to follow
Golbogga and revoltant Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0003
rows.name:
Do you intend to deny our
entire reason for existing!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0004
rows.name:
You're so annoying! Even if you
call it revoltanting, it's just
like a regular meal, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's fine as long as we do it in moderation. Calling it a
mission and making a big deal out of every little thing...
Trachlo-san and the rest of you are so old-fashioned![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0006
rows.name:
Wh-...! Orleron, correct yourself!
Insulting our noble mission is absolutely
outrageous! It is unforgivable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0007
rows.name:
Heh, I don't care about any of that! Wouldn't it
be better if you talked to Earthlings too and
broadened your perspective a little, Trachlo-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hey, hey, we finally get to
live alongside aliens! Let's
enjoy this life a little more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0010
rows.name:
Revoltanting? Heheh! Stop
fixating on such a boring meal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ugh...! Please stop, please stop! Do
not let me hear such filthy words![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0012
rows.name:
I can no longer manage you! I cannot
consider you a brethren when you have
lost your pride as a Zaruboggan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0013
rows.name:
Oh... Golbogga... Please forgive
this deeply sinful descendant...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060605_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hey! Trachlo-san! You don't have to
talk like that, do you! It's not like
I hate you guys or anything...[ST:wait ]
